candidate_definition_hints.text: Document (PDF, Word, PPTX ...) extraction and parse API using state of the art modern OCRs + Ollama supported models. Anonymize documents. Remove PII. Convert any document or picture to structured JSON or Markdown
Convert any image, PDF or Office document to Markdown *text* or JSON structured document with super-high accuracy, including tabular data, numbers or math formulas.
